name: devflow
description: Structured AI-assisted development workflow — from project discovery to verification. Single entry point /devflow guides you through requirements, design, implementation, and testing with full-chain numbered tracking. Uses full-repo copy isolation for concurrent feature development and mandatory merge validation to catch conflicts and semantic regressions.

interface.shortDescription: AI dev workflow: clarify -> breakdown -> blueprint -> implement -> verify
interface.longDescription: DevFlow v2.4 — AI 开发规范流程，单一入口，按阶段推进，闭环管理。输入 /devflow + 模糊需求，自动走完需求澄清、需求拆解、方案蓝图、编码实现、测试验证五个阶段。支持完整副本会话隔离，允许同一用户同时推进多个 feature 而互不干扰；完成前强制合并验证，检测目标分支新变更并验证涉及 feat 的测试用例，防止冲突与语义回归。每个阶段 checkpoint 可继续/跳转/暂停。支持 L1 烟雾扫描 + L2 Playwright 交互验证 + L3 结构化手工验证的三层验证体系，并新增 AI 视觉审查能力：通过 Playwright 截图 + AI 视觉分析自动捕获 UI 重叠、遮挡、溢出、截断等前端展示问题。验证深度评分 + 证据驱动，拒绝虚假通过。
interface.defaultPrompt: 帮我对现有项目运行 /devflow 流程
